Home.testimonialsSubtitle: Join thousands of developers who are already building amazing things.
Home.t1text: This is hands-down the most beautiful starter I've used. The i18n setup is flawless!
Home.t2text: I was blown away by how fast I could get a production-ready, multilingual site running.
Home.t3text: The Glassmorphism design and the particle animation are absolutely stunning. 10/10.
Home.ctaDesc: Start your journey today. No credit card required.
